allow: PowerShell(\(Get-Content setup.iss -Raw\).Replace\("'HA_SOUND_FEEDBACK=true' + #13#10 +`r`n      'HA_CONTINUE_ON_QUESTION=false' + #13#10 +", "'HA_SOUND_FEEDBACK=true' + #13#10 +`r`n      'HA_PROCESSING_SOUND=false' + #13#10 +`r`n      'HA_SOUND_ACTIVATION=activation.wav' + #13#10 +`r`n      'HA_SOUND_DEACTIVATION=deactivation.wav' + #13#10 +`r`n      'HA_SOUND_PROCESSING=processing.wav' + #13#10 +`r`n      'HA_CONTINUE_ON_QUESTION=false' + #13#10 +"\) | Set-Content setup.iss -Encoding utf8 -NoNewline; Select-String -Path setup.iss -Pattern 'HA_PROCESSING_SOUND')
PowerShell(python -m pytest tests/test_utils.py -v --no-header -p no:cacheprovider -k "SoundConfiguration or ProcessingSoundLoop")
PowerShell(python -m py_compile main.py utils.py satellite_protocol.py flet_settings.py)

PowerShell($env:HA_PROCESSING_SOUND='true'; python -c "import utils, time; started = utils.processing_sound_loop.start\(\); print\('started:', started\); time.sleep\(3.5\); t0=time.time\(\); utils.processing_sound_loop.stop\(\); print\('stopped in %.3fs' % \(time.time\(\)-t0\)\); utils.processing_sound_loop.stop\(\); print\('idempotent stop OK'\)")

PowerShell($env:HA_PROCESSING_SOUND='true'; python -c "import utils, time`nfor i in range\(3\):`n    utils.processing_sound_loop.start\(\); time.sleep\(2.0\); t0=time.time\(\); utils.processing_sound_loop.stop\(\); print\('stop %d: %.3fs' % \(i, time.time\(\)-t0\)\)")

PowerShell(python -m pytest tests/ -q --no-header -p no:cacheprovider 2>$null | Select-String -Pattern '^FAILED|passed|failed' | Out-File -Encoding utf8 "$env:TEMP\\after.txt"; git stash push --include-untracked -- utils.py main.py satellite_protocol.py flet_settings.py tests/test_utils.py sound/processing.wav | Out-Null; python -m pytest tests/ -q --no-header -p no:cacheprovider 2>$null | Select-String -Pattern '^FAILED|passed|failed' | Out-File -Encoding utf8 "$env:TEMP\\before.txt"; git stash pop | Out-Null; Compare-Object \(Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\before.txt"\) \(Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\after.txt"\))
PowerShell(python -c "import flet_settings; d = flet_settings.__dict__; print\('import OK'\)")

PowerShell($env:HA_PROCESSING_SOUND='true'; $env:HA_SOUND_PROCESSING='processing2.wav'; python -c "import utils, time; print\('started:', utils.processing_sound_loop.start\(\)\); time.sleep\(2.5\); utils.processing_sound_loop.stop\(\); print\('stopped OK'\)")

PowerShell(git add utils.py main.py satellite_protocol.py flet_settings.py tests/test_utils.py .env.example README.md install-linux.sh setup.iss setup_debug.iss CLAUDE.md sound/processing.wav sound/processing2.wav)
